text: Hi, I’m new to this system and just wanted to check something. When booking an appointment I see options like 'today', 'tomorrow', and 'next week'. Does that mean those are the only available dates or will more options appear later?
I’m trying to understand how rescheduling works. If I move an appointment to a different day, does the doctor automatically get notified or do I need to confirm something else afterwards?
Quick question about payments: does the card get charged immediately when booking an appointment, or only after the appointment actually happens?
I’m a bit confused about the appointment status labels. I see things like PENDING and CONFIRMED in the table but I’m not sure what the difference is.
Just checking something: if I cancel an appointment, will I automatically get a confirmation email or should I just rely on the website status?
Hi, I noticed that the booking page only lists three doctors. Are there usually more doctors available or is that the full list?
I’m wondering whether it’s possible to book appointments more than a week in advance. The dropdown only shows a few options.
I just wanted to confirm whether the appointment times shown are in my local timezone or the clinic’s timezone.
Does the system send any reminders before the appointment time, or should I set my own reminders?
Is there a way to see past appointments in the system or does the list only show upcoming ones?
I accidentally booked the wrong doctor earlier but realized it right away. Is the best way to fix that by canceling and booking again?
Hi support, just wondering if the payment page stores my card information or if it’s only used for that one transaction.
When I open the appointments page I see the status column but I’m not sure what each status actually means.
Does the help page send messages directly to the clinic or to the website support team?
I was curious whether it's possible to book recurring appointments through the system.
If I cancel an appointment and then immediately book another one, will that cause any issues with billing?
The booking page seems pretty straightforward but I wasn’t sure if there are any hidden steps after confirming.
Hi, I just wanted to ask whether appointments can be rescheduled multiple times or if there is a limit.
When I reschedule an appointment, does the old appointment automatically disappear from the system?
Is there any way to download a confirmation or receipt for an appointment booking?
I’m wondering if the system works on mobile devices or if it’s mainly designed for desktop browsers.
The booking interface is nice but I’m not sure if there are additional instructions somewhere for new users.
Do appointment confirmations get emailed automatically or do they only appear on the website?
I was trying to find the privacy policy but couldn’t see it anywhere in the interface.
Is there a limit on how many appointments I can book at once?
If I miss an appointment, will it automatically disappear from the list afterwards?
Can multiple family members use the same account to book appointments?
I’m wondering if there is a way to contact the doctor directly through this system.
Does the system support video appointments or is it only for in-person visits?
Is it possible to change the email address associated with my account?
I noticed the account page only shows my user ID and email. Are there more settings available somewhere?
If I submit a help request through the support form, how long does it normally take to get a response?
Do you offer phone support as well or only the online help form?
I’m just curious whether appointment times are fixed or if they sometimes change after booking.
Does the system automatically notify the clinic when I cancel an appointment?
Can I change the doctor on an appointment without canceling it first?
Is there any way to leave feedback about the app itself?
I noticed the booking page only shows a few time slots. Are those the only times available?
Do I need to create a new account for each family member or can they share one?
I’m trying to understand the workflow. After booking an appointment, is there anything else I need to do?
Is there a way to export my appointment details to a calendar app?
Can I update my email address somewhere in the account settings?
Do appointment reminders get sent automatically before the appointment date?
If I cancel an appointment, does the time slot become immediately available again?
I’m wondering whether the payment page supports multiple card types or only Visa.
Is there a way to view previous help requests that I submitted?
I noticed the account page has a reset password button. Does it send a reset email automatically?
Are appointment confirmations stored somewhere on the site after booking?
Does the system keep a history of canceled appointments?
Is it possible to see which doctor booked an appointment for me if someone else scheduled it?
